---
title: aws
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## sign up for AWS 

There is a free option:

* http://aws.amazon.com/  
* https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awsaccountbilling/latest/aboutv2/free-tier-limits.html  
* https://aws.amazon.com/free/  


*********************************************************************

### create an IAM user

Identity and Access Management

http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/get-set-up-for-amazon-ec2.html#create-an-iam-user


*********************************************************************

## command line tools

```sh
# install
brew install awscli

# check installation
aws --version
which aws

# configure
aws configure
```

*********************************************************************

## s3

* https://aws.amazon.com/s3/

### ls

```sh
aws s3 ls
```

```r
system("aws s3 ls", intern = TRUE)
```

### sync 

#### include / exclude

E.g. only sync files with a specific extension

```
aws s3 sync source_dir dest_dir --include '*' --exclude '*asdf.ext' --dryrun
```

E.g. ignore dotfiles

```
aws s3 sync source_dir dest_dir --include '*' --exclude '.*' --dryrun
```

*********************************************************************

## ec2

* https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/
